gleam 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference

Project One Year of Steady-State Population Dynamics

Source: R/herd_simulation_core_model.R
project_population_size.Rd

Simulates one year of population dynamics under steady-state assumptions using demographic parameters and returns population size statistics and offtake results.

project_population_size(
  herd_size_total,
  fecundity_female,
  fecundity_male,
  probability_death,
  probability_offtake,
  probability_growth,
  growth_rate_herd,
  herd_structure,
  cohort_share
)

Arguments

herd_size_total

Numeric. Total population size at the start of the year.

fecundity_female

Numeric. Daily female births per adult female.

fecundity_male

Numeric. Daily male births per adult female.

probability_death

Named numeric vector of length 10. Daily death probabilities. Must be named using: FB, FJ, FS, FA, FC, MB, MJ, MS, MA, MC.

probability_offtake

Named numeric vector of length 10. Daily offtake probabilities. Names must match those in probability_death.

probability_growth

Named numeric vector of length 10. Transition probabilities to next age class. Names must match those in probability_death.

growth_rate_herd

Numeric. Annual population growth rate.

herd_structure

Named numeric vector of length 8. Final population share in 8 classes. Must be named: FB, FJ, FS, FA, MB, MJ, MS, MA.

cohort_share

Named numeric vector of length 6. Final population share in 6 grouped classes. Must be named: FJ, FS, FA, MJ, MS, MA.

Value

A named list with:

cohort_stock_start

Size in 6 sex-age classes at the start of the year.

cohort_stock_end_projected

Size at year end (projected using growth rate).

cohort_stock_end_exact_simulated

Size at year end (based on full simulation over 366 days).

cohort_stock_average

Average population size over the year.

cohort_offtake_heads

Total offtake over the year per sex-age class.

Contents

Developed by Ahmed Jou, Yassine Elaouni, Dominik Wisser, Lydia Lanzoni, Giuseppe Tempio, Federal Ministry of Agriculture, Food and Regional Identity of Germany BMELH.

Site built with pkgdown 2.1.3.
